headline: Accenture plc (ACN) Invests in AlphaSense in Pursuit of AI Market Intelligence Opportunities
summary: Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) is a deep-value stock to invest in now. On June 3, Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) reiterated its commitment to helping clients use data and artificial intelligence more effectively to drive growth and accelerate reinvention. Consequently, the company has made a strategic investment in AlphaSense, an AI platform transforming market intelligence for the business […]
